message:
fix(security): extend content hashes to cover all deterministic fields for tamper-evidence

Multiple content-hash computations were incomplete — they hashed only a
subset of the fields that influence an artifact's semantics, allowing
un-hashed fields to be changed without invalidating the hash. Each fix
extends the hash preimage to cover all semantically relevant fields:

- recovery_artifact: hash proof_elements and operator_actions (operator,
  action, authorization_hash, timestamp_ticks) into artifact_id
- self_replacement: include all 5 sandbox constraint fields
  (filesystem_access_allowed, max_execution_ns, max_heap_bytes,
  max_hostcalls, network_egress_allowed) in DelegateCellManifest
  signature preimage
- shipped_path_matrix: hash artifact_kind, workload_class, detail, and
  optional content hashes (content_hash_a, content_hash_b) for each
  mismatch into the evaluate_matrix input hash via new
  update_optional_content_hash helper
- epoch_invalidation: include reason, epoch_before_invalidation,
  current_epoch, rollback_hash, and baseline_hash in receipt ID hash
- governance_mechanism: add analysis_subsystem parameter to
  EnforcementPolicy::compute_hash so policies for different subsystems
  produce distinct content hashes
- wasm_runtime_lane: switch derive_id from Debug formatting to
  serde_json::to_string for stable canonical serialization of mode field
- policy_theorem_compiler: replace silent .unwrap_or_default() with
  .expect() on serialization failure — silently signing an empty preimage
  would be a security defect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -374,6 +374,26 @@ impl SignaturePreimage for DelegateCellManifest {
             "signature".to_string(),
             CanonicalValue::Bytes(SIGNATURE_SENTINEL.to_vec()),
         );
+        map.insert(
+            "sandbox_filesystem_access_allowed".to_string(),
+            CanonicalValue::Bool(self.sandbox.filesystem_access_allowed),
+        );
+        map.insert(
+            "sandbox_max_execution_ns".to_string(),
+            CanonicalValue::U64(self.sandbox.max_execution_ns),
+        );
+        map.insert(
+            "sandbox_max_heap_bytes".to_string(),
+            CanonicalValue::U64(self.sandbox.max_heap_bytes),
+        );
+        map.insert(
+            "sandbox_max_hostcalls".to_string(),
+            CanonicalValue::U64(self.sandbox.max_hostcalls),
+        );
+        map.insert(
+            "sandbox_network_egress_allowed".to_string(),
+            CanonicalValue::Bool(self.sandbox.network_egress_allowed),
+        );
         map.insert(
             "slot_id".to_string(),
             CanonicalValue::String(self.slot_id.as_str().to_string()),
